sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 18.10 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.18)

statement.latex: A formation$F$of finite groups satisfies the Wielandt property for residuals\/ if whenever$U$and$V$are subnormal subgroups of$U, V$in a finite group$G$, then the$F$-residual$U, V ^{ F}$of$U, V$coincides with$U^{ F}, V^{ F}$. Does every Fitting formation$F$satisfy the Wielandt property for residuals?

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
